shared_context.goal: Manual Adjustment run must fetch every premium-scope row from extend_db_ptrj and decide input eligibility from remarks sync/match tokens, not from rigid premium names or live amount guessing.
shared_context.canonical_remarks_format: ADJUSTMENT_NAME | AD_CODE - DESC | AMOUNT | sync:STATUS | match:STATUS
shared_context.input_rule: Send only rows with sync:MISS/MISSING/NOT_FOUND or match:MISMATCH/DIFF/PARTIAL; skip sync:SYNC and match:MATCH.
shared_context.external_backend_scope: Allowed when endpoint blocks correct fetch/filter. Prefer fixing /payroll/manual-adjustment/by-api-key and /payroll/manual-adjustment/sync-status/by-api-key in refactor_production instead of adding desktop-side hacks.

risk_notes: Current UI already parses sync:/match: tokens, but premium retry logic can override remarks with sync-status/check-adtrans verification and skip MISMATCH rows.
configs/adjustment-categories.json has special categories for premi_tiket etc, while several UI maps still only mention premi or premi_tunjangan.
KOREKSI PANEN appears as POTONGAN_KOTOR with remarks sync:MISS | match:MISMATCH and must remain eligible even when adjustment_name is not a premium category.
Runner premium detail grouping needs correct detail_type/ad_code metadata; amount-only premium like PREMI TIKET must not be forced through blok/kendaraan detail rules.
External refactor_production may need endpoint edits if by-api-key still filters by rigid adjustment_name or grouped view drops POTONGAN_KOTOR rows.
